---
title: "prexorctl crash info"
description: "Show crash details"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

## Usage

```text
prexorctl crash info <id> [flags]
```

## Flags

```text
--burn-after-read   Destroy the paste on first read
        --expiry string     Paste expiry preset: 1h | 1d | 30d | never
    -h, --help              help for info
        --public            Mark the paste public (overrides share.defaultPrivate=true)
        --share             Upload a redacted copy to the configured paste service and print the link
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```
